description_long: This object is a standard skateboard featuring a black, slightly concave deck with upturned nose and tail, constructed from layered wood. The deck is topped with a solid black grip tape, providing a textured, grippy surface for traction. Underneath, two metal trucks are mounted, each holding a pair of small, white, classic-style wheels. The wheels are smooth and round, suitable for street or park skating, and the trucks are a standard silver color with no visible branding. The edges of the deck reveal the natural wood layers, adding a subtle contrast to the otherwise dark appearance. There are no visible graphics, logos, or decorative elements on the deck or wheels.
description: A classic skateboard with a black grip-taped wooden deck, silver trucks, and white wheels, featuring a clean, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, upturned nose and tail, and both sets of white wheels and silver trucks.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the rounded nose of the deck, black grip tape, and the two front wheels partially visible beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same features visible: black deck, upturned ends, and white wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rounded tail of the deck, black grip tape, and the two rear wheels partially visible beneath.
attribute_wheel_type: classic, white, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard silver trucks, top-mounted, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no pattern or graphics
